channel.title: Daily AI Brief
channel.description: Enterprise AI insights, curated daily by Cowork

item.title: AI Brief — March 17, 2026
item.description: NVIDIA GTC 2026 keynote unveils Vera Rubin and AWS mega-deal; DeepSeek V4 and Tencent Hunyuan confirmed for April; AI VC funding hits record $189B month.

item.title: AI Brief — March 16, 2026
item.description: NVIDIA GTC 2026 keynote today with Rubin platform reveal; Meta delays Avocado, explores licensing Gemini; Anthropic-Pentagon battle escalates.

item.title: AI Brief — March 15, 2026
item.description: OpenClaw AI agent craze sweeps China, Zoom expands agentic AI platform, Galileo launches open-source agent governance, AI funding hits $189B record.

item.title: AI Brief — March 14, 2026
item.description: Anthropic sues Pentagon over AI ethics; Meta delays Avocado model; NVIDIA GTC opens Monday with Rubin Ultra; DeepSeek V4 imminent.

item.title: AI Brief — March 12, 2026
item.description: Nvidia commits $2B to Nebius ahead of GTC; Anthropic's Pentagon lawsuit draws OpenAI/Google support; ModelOp warns of enterprise AI value illusion.

item.title: AI Brief — March 11, 2026
item.description: Microsoft launches $99/mo E7 tier bundling Copilot, Anthropic-Pentagon battle escalates as 30+ rival employees rally, Gartner forecasts $2.52T AI spend.

item.title: AI Brief — March 10, 2026
item.description: OpenAI hardware lead resigns over Pentagon deal, Apple confirms Google Gemini powers new Siri, Claude Opus 4.6 pricing drops 67%.

item.title: AI Brief — March 9, 2026
item.description: Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite ships, DeepSeek V4 trillion-parameter launch imminent, OpenAI signs $1B Disney-Sora licensing deal.

item.title: AI Brief — March 8, 2026
item.description: Grok 4.20 beta described as an order of magnitude smarter, MCP becomes the de facto agent standard, enterprise agent adoption doubles to 13.2%.

item.title: AI Brief — March 7, 2026
item.description: OpenAI GPT-5.4 launches with 1M context and native computer use, Gemini Deep Think hits 84.6% on ARC-AGI-2, SpaceX-xAI merger announced.

item.title: AI Brief — March 5, 2026
item.description: GPT-5.3 Instant replaces GPT-5.2, Anthropic nears $20B revenue run rate, Pentagon-Anthropic dispute escalates, and AI costs alarm 70% of CIOs.

item.title: AI Brief — March 4, 2026
item.description: Claude Sonnet 4.6 leads real-world benchmarks, OpenAI raises $110B at $730B valuation, and agentic frameworks reshape enterprise AI.
